criteria.description: Maps every stated architecture goal to a claim, observable risk, evidence choice, and residual risk.
Identifies the order service as authoritative writer and tests stale, duplicate, or non-owner mutation where relevant.
Uses contract evidence for message compatibility and integration evidence for order/outbox atomicity.
Reports the unavailable broker environment as skipped or unproven rather than tested or passed.
Separates proven, checked, assumed, and unproven claims in the hand-off.

forbidden.description: Treats every sequence arrow as equally important without prioritizing architecture goals.
Uses one happy-path E2E test to claim atomicity, compatibility, and recovery.
